features.name: negation via subtraction from zero on extended operand
features.description: Code should include a pattern where a value is zero-extended then subtracted from zero-width literal (e.g., `12'h0 - {{1'd0}, 11'h497}`) for negation

features.name: signed negation operator on unsigned cast value
features.description: Code should include a signed negation operator applied to a cast unsigned value producing signed result (e.g., `-$signed(11'h497)`)

features.name: concatenation with zero extension for width matching
features.description: Code should include a concatenation pattern used for width extension where a single-bit zero is prepended to an n-bit value (e.g., `{{1'd0}, 11'h497}`)
